category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a software environment for statistical computing; official R Project homepage says R is for statistical computing and graphics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.executables lists R and Rscript; official R Project homepage uses the display name R.
docs_sources: Official CRAN manuals page lists R manuals maintained by the R Core Team; official R Project homepage links to documentation.
repo_sources: Official R Development Guide states R uses SVN hosted at https://svn.r-project.org/R/.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions statistical computing; official R homepage mentions statistical computing and graphics.
